title: Ikai Dek Wat Chedi
original_title: ไอ้ไข่ เด็กวัดเจดีย์
overview: Long time ago, A holy monk on pilgrimage has brought the spirit of a 10-year-old deposited him at abandoned temple, Sichon district of Nakorn Si Thammarat. His order to the boy was "watch over this place until a virtuous man arrives".
